footer.description: Local agency specialized in private and tailor-made tours in Madagascar.

meta.topbar_left: Private tours in Madagascar with local guides

hero.title: Private tours in Madagascar with local experts
hero.text: Discover lemurs, baobabs, national parks, beaches, and Malagasy villages with a trusted local team.

about.title: Discover Madagascar with real local guides

founder.experience: Working in tourism since 2015, professional guide since 2017
paragraphs: Hello, my name is MILASOA Ricki Cardo, originally from Antalaha in Madagascar and now based in Antananarivo. I have worked in tourism since 2015 and became a professional tour guide in 2017.

I speak Malagasy, French, English, and a little German. With several years of experience across Madagascar, I have guided travelers from many countries in Europe, Asia, Africa, Australia, and the United States.
We create experiences that combine nature, culture, history, and Malagasy biodiversity. We also offer translation services and tailor-made evening events.

In 2024, we launched a travel agency with drivers, guides, and a marketing manager to provide a higher quality service. Our goal is simple: to help you discover Madagascar as if you were traveling with a friend.
founder.reference_text: We are also listed on SafariBookings.com, a reference platform for safaris and tour operators.

why.title: A local, flexible, and reassuring experience
why.text: We create trips adapted to your pace, budget, and interests.

reasons.title: Local guides
reasons.text: Guides who know the parks, the culture, and the best routes.

reasons.title: Tailor-made trips
reasons.text: Each itinerary can be adjusted to your dates and preferences.

reasons.title: Nature and culture
reasons.text: Lemurs, baobabs, Tsingy, Isalo, beaches, and local encounters.

reasons.title: Easy contact
reasons.text: Chat quickly on WhatsApp before and during the trip.

tours_catalog.title: All available trips
tours_catalog.text: This section helps the customer quickly compare tours by duration, destination, travel style, and price.

gallery.title: Inspire travelers with the most beautiful landscapes
gallery.text: The gallery should show real photos: clients, guides, parks, animals, hotels, vehicles, and highlights of the trip.

video.title: See the journey before you book it
video.text: A short video helps visitors discover the atmosphere, landscapes, and comfort of the experience before choosing a tour.
video.sidebar_text: A focused video can reassure visitors about the quality of the destination, the rhythm of the trip, and the local support they will receive.

points.0: Show real places, roads, lodges, and landscapes.
points.1: Build trust with a more immersive presentation.
points.2: Help visitors imagine their future trip more clearly.

memories.title: Travel memories to keep the emotion alive
memories.text: This section highlights short videos that visitors can watch as travel souvenirs and inspiration for their next tour.
memories.card_text_fallback: A short memory from Madagascar to relive the atmosphere of the journey.

payments.title: Several payment methods to reassure travelers
payments.text: Clearly display the available payment options before booking to reduce hesitation from international clients.

custom_trip.title: Not sure which tour to choose?
custom_trip.text: Send us your dates, budget, and preferences. We will prepare a suitable itinerary for your stay in Madagascar.

fallback.quote: Amazing trip! The guide was friendly, professional, and showed us beautiful places in Madagascar.
Very flexible itinerary and excellent communication before the tour. Highly recommended.
We loved the lemurs, the baobabs, and the local villages. Everything was very well organized.

faq.title: The answers your travelers look for before booking
faq.text: This section helps visitors quickly clear up doubts before going to the contact form.

items.question: What is the best time for a great trip to Madagascar?
items.answer: The best season depends on the experience you are looking for. In general, April to November is ideal for enjoying the landscapes, parks, and major tours.

items.question: Can you create a 100% private and tailor-made trip for us?
items.answer: Yes, that is exactly our specialty. We build your trip according to your budget, length of stay, number of travelers, and preferences.

items.question: What is included in your rate when we request a quote?
items.answer: Depending on the selected tour, the quote may include the vehicle, driver, guide, accommodations, transfers, and some entrance fees. Everything is clearly detailed before confirmation.

items.question: How quickly can we receive an answer?
items.answer: We reply quickly after receiving your message. If you leave a WhatsApp number or a valid email address, we can send you a first response and move forward fast with your quote.

items.question: Can you organize the whole trip, not just the tour?
items.answer: Yes. We can handle the full organization: driver, local guides, transfers, accommodations, and personalized program.

contact.title: Plan your trip to Madagascar
contact.text: Tell us about your travel plans. You can also contact us directly through our official channels.

tour_detail.title: Andasibe Lemur Tour
tour_detail.description: A short tour to discover Madagascar's tropical forest, observe Indri lemurs, visit nature reserves, and enjoy a private trip with a local guide.

program.day1_text: Departure from Antananarivo, drive to Andasibe, photo stops, and a night visit depending on arrival time.
program.day2_text: Guided park visit to observe lemurs, birds, chameleons, and endemic plants.
program.day3_text: Optional visit to a private reserve before returning to Antananarivo.

sidebar.title: Request this tour
sidebar.text: The traveler can ask a question, check availability, or request a customized version.
